facility_collection_system: CHARLOTTE HALL VETERANS HOME WWTP & COLLECTION SYSTEM
overflow_cause:
An unusually high volume of sewage flow was detected from the Charlotte Hall
Veteran’s Home to the WWTP. Typical daily flows range between 30,000 and 40,000
gallons; however, on March 28, 80,000 gallons were received. Historical data from the
SCADA system indicates that around 20:30 on March 27, 2025, a continuous sewage
flow began, doubling the normal daily intake. The source of the increased flow is
currently under investigation.

An estimated 3,000 gallons of sewage overflowed the EQ Basin at the WWTP and
pooled on the surrounding asphalt and concrete.
